dca_fg on SPY

DCA + 'buy the fear'. Most of the budget contributes on the regular cadence (default 80%); the rest waits in cash and deploys in chunks whenever CNN's Fear & Greed index closes below the fear_threshold (default 25, 'extreme fear'). Combines DCA's discipline with a contrarian boost on sentiment crashes. A single fear episode only fires the reserve once — the index must recover above the threshold before the next fear-buy can arm. Requires F&G data; pick the source via --fg-source.

Window 2015-01-01 → 2024-12-31 · Budget $10,000.00

Data options: {"fg_source": "whit3rabbit"}

Idle cash earns 0%. Orders execute at next trading day's adjusted close. Costs as set in controls.
